prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the DAZA 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo) with upgraded turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.06 A/R housing) paired with APR’s high-flow downpipe (3.5" diameter, catless) and CTS Turbo 4" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with resonated center section for reduced drone. Supporting mods include APR’s upgraded intercooler (core volume: 2.2L, bar-and-plate design) and Integrated Engineering’s ported cylinder head (flow-optimized for 30+ psi boost) with upgraded valve springs (Ferrea F214P) and titanium retainers (Supertech).

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Audi-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound, 40mm front/36mm rear piston diameter) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 800N/mm rear springs, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (hollow-core, adjustable end links). Chassis reinforcement via 034 Motorsport X-Brace (aluminum, 30% stiffer than OEM) and Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm discs, Type-5 pads) and 4-piston rear (356mm discs) big brake kit with DOT 4+ Motul RBF660 brake fluid.

Weichers Motorsport 7-speed S tronic transmission reinforcement kit (billet steel shift forks, upgraded clutch packs, and reinforced differential housing) with a 034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel (10.5kg, 6061-T6 aluminum) and Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity). Engine mounts upgraded to 034 Motorsport Street Density inserts (80A durometer) and transmission mount to Vibratechnics Pro Bushing (polyurethane, 95A). Fuel system includes a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (340L/h) and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (1700cc, ethanol-compatible) with an AEM 340LPH ethanol fuel pump for E85 blends.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, 30mm front/50mm rear fender flares) with custom front splitter (20mm overhang, 3D-printed ABS core, carbon fiber weave) and GT3-style rear diffuser (dual-layer carbon fiber, integrated tow hooks). Carbon fiber hood replacement by Seibon (OEM-style latches, 50% weight reduction) with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler airflow. Side skirts replaced with 3D Carbon’s RS3-specific units (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, aggressive side profile).

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 front and 19x11 ET40 rear wheels (forged 3-piece, 5x112 PCD, 20mm front/25mm rear spacers) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Custom matte vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Satin Black) with gloss carbon fiber accents (hood, mirror caps, diffuser) and OEM+ carbon fiber side blades (Audi Sport part #8V0-071-641-A). LED headlight retrofit with LUX H8 V4 projectors (bi-xenon, 55W, 5000K) and Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (H7, 150% brighter).

Interior upgrades include Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leatherette, 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses) with custom door cards (carbon fiber inserts, LED ambient lighting). Steering wheel replaced with a MOMO Mod.70 (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) and shift knob by BFI (short-throw, weighted, aluminum). Roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in, 6-point, powder-coated satin black) with fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 4kg agent).
